summary:
MOURNING AND SPIRITUAL REFLECTION: Brandon begins by expressing deep sorrow over the tragic murder of Charlie Kirk, urging listeners to pray for his grieving wife and children. Brandon reflects on the fragility of life, warning that nobody is guaranteed tomorrow, and emphasizes the need for the church to remain steadfast and bold in the face of adversity. Brandon interprets this tragic event as a spiritual attack and a distraction orchestrated by dark forces to create turmoil, urging his audience to maintain their faith and intercede for their loved ones through prayer.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND VISIONS: Brandon recounts several prophetic visions he received, including a shot heard around the world and warnings about a difficult September. Brandon asserts that the timing of recent events near the September 11 anniversary is a deliberate statement from evil forces rather than a coincidence. He describes seeing symbolic imagery, such as a demonic hypnotic wheel designed to distract the public from clandestine global maneuvers involving nations like Russia, South Korea, China, and Iran forming an end-time beast system. Brandon also details impending attacks, including a vision of an underground parking garage in New York housing an abandoned white GMC cargo van filled with wired explosive drums, which he perceives as a thwarted plot against a Trump building.

PRAYERS FOR NATIONAL LEADERS AND SECURITY: Brandon leads a fervent prayer session covering the nation with spiritual protection, specifically interceding for the safety of political figures like Donald Trump, Don Jr, Eric Trump, and JD Vance, as well as various ministers. Brandon prays against mass casualty events and terrorist plots, pleading for divine intervention over commercial airlines, FAA operations, and large gatherings. He highlights a strong spiritual urgency to protect college football stadiums and tailgate parties, mentioning specific team colors like Alabama's red and white and Texas's burnt orange, claiming these are targeted locations for disruption.

GLOBAL ESCALATION AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING: Brandon describes further international visions, portraying a geopolitical chess game involving Vladimir Putin, the King of England, Emmanuel Macron, and leaders from Germany and Italy. He warns of a false flag event in France and drones over Poland, interpreting these as provocations meant to instigate broader conflicts. In response to these global tensions, Brandon calls for a massive spiritual awakening and revival across the world, from Asia and Africa to South America. He concludes by urging listeners to repent, embrace a personal relationship with God, and prepare for the imminent return of Jesus.
rawData: [September 11, 2025]-[Praying for our nation]-[https://youtu.be/nmPlz2p1b7s]-[Well, good evening, family. It's kind of a rough day for some folks. When something like this happens, it's really sad for our nation. It's sad for the people. We pray for Charlie's wife and his kids. And we know where Charlie's at. Charlie's with Jesus. To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord. And we're so grateful that I don't believe there was any suffering, but we pray for the comfort for his wife right now and for his children. It's a very sad day for them. When you see somebody going through that and you have little kids of your own, it's just overwhelming, isn't it? The grief and the compassion that you have for somebody and you don't even know them, but as just as a brother in the Lord, you just pray for them. You pray for them because they're going through something really hard right now. They're going through that valley of the shadow of death. His wife is right now, the storms of life, the refining fire, the things that just sucker punch when you woke... Like I tell you all the time, the very shoes you put on today, the morgue might be taking them off tomorrow. I mean tonight when you get... and you not make it home. Let me say that again. The very shoes you put on today to go to do what you're going to do, the morgue might be taking them off that evening. And it's very important that you all know that we're in very trying times like everybody can see right now, uncertain times. And no one's ever promised tomorrow. It's appointed unto man once to die and after that the judgment. I say that over and over and over to warn you of how serious the times are that we're living in right now. And when I put out the video today to warn the body of Christ that it was time for them to have a backbone like a crowbar, it was a refresher to warn you what I've given these words in June the 15th that the church needs to rise up and be the church like we've never been before. That we have authority over all of the principalities and the powers and the spiritual wickedness in high places. When I'm telling you by the spirit of God what the Lord is warning me as a watchman sitting out on the wall telling you what's coming, I'm not trying to scare you. I'm trying to prepare you, like I've said a thousand times. But as we see a brother in the Lord be murdered and something so tragic happened, the Lord warned us that there was three other men that we should pray for too. From Don Jr. to other ministers of the gospel that the Lord has showed us of these tragic events, right, that this would be a sign of them trying to combat the amendment. An uprising of these things for a great distraction, for great turmoil in the spirit realm is what I've been seeing even with September to remember and even what the Lord was showing us about the shot heard around the world. It was specifically called, 'The shot was heard around the world.' That's what I saw in the news headlines. It was on the papers. It was on the TVs. When I was praying with you that day, I saw the shot heard around the world and it was big. And just like today's happened, it's in the headlines just like the Lord showed me. Well, I look at his life as a tragic fail of... say we didn't pray for him. We should have been praying more on this channel. We should be praying more. A prayer fail is what I'm talking about. This should not happen. I truly believe we have power and authority, that we pray over this stuff and that we intercede for our loved ones and we intercede as a church to cover our people in prayer so that no weapon formed against them will prosper. Now, we live in a fallen world and things happen. And when things happen, we stay on God's side regardless of... 'Well, why did God let this happen?' I don't believe God let this happen. I don't know Charlie's heart at that point. I don't know what the Lord was speaking to him this morning. Nobody does. But I always choose to stay on God's side even whenever I don't understand why what happened happened. Stay on the good side and say, 'Father, I thank you, Lord, that Charlie's life doesn't go in vain. Father, that his life meant something to so many people and, Father, I thank you that we take the baton and we speak for what's right and what's truthful and what will prevail is God's goodness, God's mercy through a tragic event.' Now we thank the Lord for his life. He was a blessing. He was a blessing, and his wife, we pray for her, we pray for his children. Like I said, it is very sad. But there's work to be done and that's what we're here to do. Charlie would want us to go on and fight the good fight. I know, as I watch his videos, Charlie would want us to stand up like a backbone, like a crowbar. That's what he stood for, was to be bold. He was bold. I'm telling you, I've never seen anybody stand up and say the things that he said and was as bold as a lion. He wasn't a coward at all. I admire that man for what he stood for and how he stood for it, and he didn't sway away for public opinion. And when somebody came and challenged him and was like, 'You know, this is what I believe,' he would always come back right, bam, with scripture or whatever, and it was like amazing to watch somebody with that much intellect. He was so quick on his feet on how he could talk that it challenged me. I told Dad, I said, 'Man, he was witty, boy. He could talk, he had a way with his words, he was smart.' And, you know, it's a tragic loss, but I believe that what the devil meant for bad, God's going to turn around for good, and we have more Charlies out there that can come and rise up and be that and carry that baton. Don't let his legacy die with him. It's time that the church rise up and be as bold as what he was and stand, just like what he did, for what's right and what's truth and what's godly. Even in the midst of the storm, he stood for what was right. And I've never seen him back away or sway from anything that he said in any of his videos. He was never a coward. He was never limp-wristed. He was bold. And, like I said, that's amazing to me, especially in this day and age with all the political correctness. So, one thing I have to say tonight is that we pray for Don Jr., we pray for his daughter, we pray for President Trump, we pray for the ministers of the gospel that I've told you that have huge platforms. For the enemy would try to bring in fear through mass casualty shootings and things like that to try to get people to not want to go to the revivals and meetings that are in the days ahead. That was the plan to come against the amendment going into 2026 for the year of the fix. The Lord showed me, and I know it rhymes. I don't get on the Christian cliche, the weirdness of what rhymes and the prophetic rhyming. I'm telling y'all, I'm just black and white, but I hear these things and I just repeat what I'm hearing the spirit of the Lord say. So, I'm not trying to rhyme and it's not trying to be a cute slogan. I'm trying to tell you what the spirit of the Lord said. And he told me, he said, 'You must pray over your elections in 2026, for this will be midterm and concerning the governor's race. You must pray for who's in leadership over your area. For this is a strategic plan, for there will be major events coming. A shaking to awaken is coming, and many people are still asleep.' And the Lord tells us that all the time. How many times has the Lord warned us over and over and over again? The church is asleep. It's time to wake up, church. It's time to wake up. And the Lord warned us. He said it would be the shot heard around the world. And it echoed through me. And I said, "What?" And he said, "There will be a major event that everything will change in a 24-hour period. You must pray and get the church to wake up. You must yell on the mountain tops and tell them that Jesus Christ is coming." And I do it. I do it every time I'm on these videos to warn y'all. But as we see this terrible, tragic event, the Lord warned us about 9/11 is tomorrow. And I do not believe that this was a coincidence today, the day that it was picked. I believe this was a statement from the evil people. This was a statement. This is like whenever you're making your statement. It's about 9/11. Tomorrow's 9/11. It's not a coincidence is what I'm trying to tell you. People of darkness cannot stand the light of what Trump stands for. And I'm not trying to be political is what I'm trying to tell y'all. I stand for Jesus. I'm not Republican or Democrat. I'm for Jesus, but I vote Republican because of what they stand for. Do you understand what I'm saying? And so, I'm grieved today, you know. I took the time instead of being quick to talk, and even like this, I was hesitant to even make this video right now, but I felt there's so many people asking me, "Brandon, will you please pray? Will you please pray for our nation? Will you please do a live today?" And I took some time. I know it's like really late here now, but I told her, I said, "Instead of bypassing this time, we should pray as a family. We should come together and we should intercede for our nation, and we'll take communion together. We'll pray for his wife. We'll pray for his children and his relatives, or whoever is involved is grieving." I'm sure everybody, just like the nation, is. And that's what we're going to do. And we're going to pray for President Trump's safety going to the New York Yankees game. It was interesting in that video. It was strategic even whenever I told you all to pray about the New York stadium, and even the throat. A lot of people pointed that out. Not everything when I see it is a type and shadow is what I'm saying. Sometimes it's not always just black and white. This is what you're seeing. You know, a certain preacher, a minister, a major figure in the body of Christ. It's these things. Do you see what I'm saying? It's symbolic. And sometimes whenever I'm seeing in the spirit, you're seeing symbolically what the Holy Spirit is warning you. And it's not black and white, because if I came out and just said that strategically about every single thing, it's not about looking at me. How accurate is that? "Brandon said this and Brandon said to people to turn their eyes towards me." It's to attract and deflect it to Him. This is about giving Jesus all the glory in anything you see or hear. I decrease that He increase. I don't care about all that crap. And that's just what I think it is. Publicity and public opinion change with the wind. All of it. You like somebody one minute, then you don't. So that's not what we're here for. We're here to make sure you understand that Jesus Christ is coming and that we are in the end of the end of the end. And because of that, we're seeing the birthing pains. We're seeing signs. And they say, "Well, this missile hit some kind of ball of light over the ocean." And I warned you about balls of light. I told you that there would be signs coming that look like spaceships, and it was demonic, but there was a mother ship and it was demonic. It's a great deception, and the Lord warned us about these things that are coming. He said the great deception's coming and man's hearts will fail them for fear and looking after those things that are coming on the earth. The powers of heaven will be shaken. You're going to see signs in the heavens, signs in the earth. You're going to see a great cleaning of the house in the church. You're going to see all these things. The Lord warned us and told us, for judgment begins in the house of the Lord first, and we're seeing all that as we see all this stuff progress. September is a hot month. I told you it was circled with a fog over it, and the Lord said, "You must pray over the month of September." And we—I've been warning you about this since, I believe, March. March was the first vision I started to see about September. And here we have a major event that just took place today, very sad. But this is not it. I believe this is a distraction. I believe this is a sleight of hand. "Look over here." Remember I told you all, "Look over here," as they're doing something over here. And many people say, "What are you trying to say about the hypnotic wheel?" The hypnotic wheel. What does a hypnotic wheel do? It's black and yellow. And it was being spun, and everybody was watching it, even through the media and everything else, and it said, "Watch, it's spinning." Many people do not realize what's happening over here as they're doing something over here. What is today about? It's bigger than this rally. It's bigger than this. It represents something. And so that's why you cannot just look at it as being close to the trees. You must back away prophetically from the lens of things and get away from the trees and be able to look through a lens differently. The picture is much bigger than what's in front of your face. Too many people are close to the trees right now and you don't see it. You must look through a different lens. There's much more to this. I'm getting it in my spirit. What's happening over here? Last night, there was an explosion in South Korea. Now, we can save that for another day because this is really probably not the time to do that. If you have communion, we'll take communion, and we'll pray for his family right now. Father, we lift up the body before you. We thank you, Lord, that you were wounded for our transgressions. You became sickness. You became disease for us. And Galatians says that Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. And I believe, Father, that we are healed and whole and well today. And we're no longer under the curse of the law. We're delivered by your blood, by your body, what you did for us on that cross 2,000 years ago. Thank you, Lord, that we don't have to have all this pain inside of our hearts. That we cast our care over onto you for you care for us. We cast those cares right now in the name of Jesus. They need the rest, and I thank you, Lord, there's a covering over their minds, there's a covering over them right now, those children tonight. I cover them, Father, in the name of Jesus, and Father, I thank you, Lord, that the legacy of what this young man was standing for does not go in vain. That the people rise up and be what you've called us to be with a backbone like a crowbar. And we take our dominion and authority and we stand for what's right in this nation. That we do not let this go. That we keep standing just like what he stood for. You may have heard about it in Bible school or whatever. But does He know you? If you were to die today, just like he did, where would you spend eternity? There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun, ladies and gentlemen, and I'm trying to warn you that you may not be here tomorrow. He didn't think he was going home today. He didn't. Where would I spend eternity? The Bible says that no man comes to the Father unless he's drawn by Him. And you're here not by coincidence, but because you're curious. You're wanting to know, 'Where are we? What's going on?' But the only reason I'm here on this YouTube channel ever is to tell you that Jesus Christ is coming, and you need to repent and get your heart right before Him before it's too late. I want you to search your heart right now. I want you to really search your soul right now and go deep down inside and say, 'Does Jesus know me? Am I sold out to Him? Are you confident that if you died today, you know where you would spend eternity?' As you watch this, I want to lead you in a prayer. I want you to know for sure where you would spend eternity. And I want you to really, really think about it right now. And if you want to accept the Lord Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior, just like Charlie did—what he stood for, he truly knew the Father, and I believe the Father truly knew him. Do you want to make sure? I want you to make sure today that if you die today just like he did, where would you spend eternity? If you don't know, then today is your day. Today's your day. I want you right now to really search your heart. And if this is speaking to you, and you feel that tugging on the inside of you, and you're backsliding, you're wayward, you haven't been living right, you've been living like the world—if you were in a lineup and you had to pick a Christian out, they wouldn't be able to tell you from the world. They'd say, 'I don't know, you blend too well.' But the Bible says we're to be called and be separate from among them, being the light and the salt in this generation, not blending in. We have to be called and be holy as He is holy. We need to stand for what's right, not living like the world. Because we're in a day and hour that no man knows when the Son of Man returns. Everybody's saying the 23rd. I don't believe that because there's too many people saying it, and no man will know. No man will know the day or the hour when the Son of Man returns. It's going to be shock and awe. He's going to come back when you least expect it—shock and awe, like a thief in the night. When does a thief come? When you're not ready, when you're asleep—as a thief in the night. I want you tonight to search yourself. But if you are here and you want to accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior, and you're watching this right now, before I go on, I just feel an urge to tell you: tonight is your night.
